ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "sta_id" INTEGER /* Station ID of the site */,
  "eco3_site" INTEGER /* ECO3 site classification */,
  "huc8_site" INTEGER /* HUC8 site classification */,
  "nutr_eco_site" INTEGER /* NUTR_ECO site classification */,
  "usda_lrr_site" TEXT /* USDA_LRR site classification */,
  "eco2_bas_dom" REAL /* Dominant ECO2 basin classification */,
  "eco3_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant ECO3 basin classification */,
  "eco3_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant ECO3 classification */,
  "huc8_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant HUC8 basin classification */,
  "huc8_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant HUC8 classification */,
  "nutr_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant nutrient basin classification */,
  "nutr_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant nutrient classification */,
  "pnv_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant potential natural vegetation basin classification */,
  "pnv_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant potential natural vegetation classification */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the site record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the site record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the site record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the site record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the site is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_nutr_eco_site FOREIGN KEY ("nutr_eco_site") REFERENCES nutrient_ecosystems ("nutr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_huc8_site FOREIGN KEY ("huc8_site") REFERENCES hydrological_regions ("huc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_eco3_site FOREIGN KEY ("eco3_site") REFERENCES ecological_regions ("eco_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecological_regions" (
  "eco_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecological region */,
  "eco_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecological region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecological region */,
  "eco_type" TEXT /* Type of ecological region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the ecological region in square kilometers */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the region record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the region record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eco_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_regions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecological_regions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrological_regions" (
  "huc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hydrological region */,
  "huc_name" TEXT /* Name of the hydrological region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hydrological region */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Primary water source */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the hydrological region in square kilometers */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the region record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the region record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("huc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_regions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_regions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_ecosystems" (
  "nutr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient ecosystem */,
  "nutr_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient ecosystem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrient ecosystem */,
  "nutrient_type" TEXT /* Type of nutrient */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the nutrient ecosystem in square kilometers */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the ecosystem record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ecosystem record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the ecosystem record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the ecosystem record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_ecosystems_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrient_ecosystems_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Site ID of the site */,
  "sta_id" INTEGER /* Station ID of the site */,
  "eco3_site" INTEGER /* ECO3 site classification */,
  "huc8_site" INTEGER /* HUC8 site classification */,
  "nutr_eco_site" INTEGER /* NUTR_ECO site classification */,
  "usda_lrr_site" TEXT /* USDA_LRR site classification */,
  "eco2_bas_dom" REAL /* Dominant ECO2 basin classification */,
  "eco3_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant ECO3 basin classification */,
  "eco3_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant ECO3 classification */,
  "huc8_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant HUC8 basin classification */,
  "huc8_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant HUC8 classification */,
  "nutr_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant nutrient basin classification */,
  "nutr_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant nutrient classification */,
  "pnv_bas_dom" INTEGER /* Dominant potential natural vegetation basin classification */,
  "pnv_bas_pct" REAL /* Percentage of the basin covered by the dominant potential natural vegetation classification */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "date_changed" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_history_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Site ID of the site */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the image was added */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_images_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_images_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Site ID of the site */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the document was added */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_documents_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
